0.text: Structural distortion in the apical segments of lung parenchyma, more prominent on the left

1.text: Macrocalcified nodular lesions in both lung parenchyma

2.text: Findings consistent with TB sequelae in the apices of both lungs

3.text: Indistinct ground-glass density appearance in the posterior segment of the right upper lobe, adjacent to the bronchovascular structure in the peripheral area
